matched.ai: If Yes, Please detail your experience below:

detector_only: how did you hear about this job opportunity?

if you selected "referred" or "other," please provide additional details in the space below (e.g., the name of the person who referred you, or a brief explanation of how you heard about this opportunity)
do you have experience working in uk government, delivering services to gds / uk service standard guidelines?
which ethnicity do you most closely identify with?
which of the following best describes your sexual orientation?
which of the following best describes your gender identity?
do you consider yourself to have a disability or long-term health condition?
have you previously served, or do you currently serve in the uk armed forces?
are you returning to work after a career break? (of a period of more than 12 months)
socio-economic background: what was the occupation of your main household earner when you were aged about 14?
yes, opencast can contact me about future job opportunities for up to 3 yearsprivacy policy

ai.notes: The HTML excerpt was truncated, so the final 'How did you hear about this job' and 'Referral/Other details' fields are missing from the JSON list.

fields.question: Resume/CV
Full name
Pronouns
Email
Phone
Current location
Current company
Are you eligible to work in the UK?
options: Yes - Visa (Skilled Worker, Post Study Worker, Spousal Visa, Graduate)

fields.question: If you selected "Yes - Other", Please Specify your Right to Work in the UK
Do you live within 45 miles of any of our hub locations (or within 80 miles if you are based in London)?
options: I do not live near any hub locations
Currently residing outside of the UK

fields.question: Please confirm your current location

Our Hybrid working policy means that your working time at Opencast will be split between multiple locations, including from our HQ and hub locations, client site or home. Travel across the UK is part of life at Opencast. This varies in frequency, and takes into account requirements of your work, our clients and your team. - Are you happy to travel as part of our hybrid model?
Are you looking for contract or perm opportunities with Opencast?
If offered a position, when would you be available to start (or what is your current notice period)?
If you are successful with us, we will be required to carry out background checks (checks include basic Disclosure, References and Financial). Are you comfortable with this?

Would you like to be considered under the Disability Confident Interview Scheme? (Opting in means you are disclosing a disability only for the purpose of the interview guarantee. This will not be treated as a request to record your disability or to arrange any adjustments.)

Security Clearance Requirement: This role requires Security Check (SC) clearance from the UK Government. To be eligible, you must have lived in the UK for the last 5 years, not spent 28 consecutive days or more outside the UK at any one time during those 5 years, and be willing to complete background checks. Please select the option that best describes your current status:
options: I currently hold active SC clearance
I previously held SC clearance which has now expired
I do not currently hold SC clearance but believe I am eligible and willing to undergo vetting
I do not believe I meet the eligibility requirements for SC clearance

fields.question: If you currently hold SC clearance, please provide the following (if known): Sponsoring organisation / Expiry date

This role requires recent government (public sector) experience and/or experience of delivering complex digital services that meet Government Digital Service (GDS) standards. Do you have this experience?
If Yes, Please detail your experience below:
